ObjectName.value: Albert Einstein's exam of maturity grades (color2)

Categories.value: Documents related to Albert Einstein|Matura certificate (Switzerland)|PD Switzerland (Official documents)|Albert Einstein in 1896|History of Aarau|1896 documents of Switzerland

ImageDescription.value: The certificate of maturity issued to Albert Einstein in 1896, at the age of 17, after attending the cantonal high school in Aarau, Switzerland. In this scoring scheme, 6 is the highest, and 1 the lowest grade.

Credit.value: scanned from p. 29 of the book "Albert Einstein – Derrière l'image", by Ze'ev Rosenkranz. Editions Neue Zürcher Zeitung, 2005. ISBN 3-03823-182-7.

Artist.value: The authorities of the Canton of Aargau, Switzerland
